chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 2305 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No. 5011/25. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For hearing of CMA No. 23881/24. 4. For order as to non-prosecution of CMA No. 30734/22. 5. For hearing of main case. 17.03.2026 None present for the petitioner. Ms. Tatheera Fatima, Advocate for Respondents (K-Electric). ----------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that a similar absence prevailed on the previous date, which suggests that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter, which stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
